hero.title: Know the real status of your EV charge points.
hero.subtitle: Watchborne helps EV charging installers monitor charging stations across multiple sites in real time.

realtime.title: Real-time supervision
realtime.description: Monitor charger status instantly with live updates and clear operational visibility.

multisite.title: Multi-site monitoring
multisite.description: Organize charging stations across multiple customers and locations.

ocpp.title: OCPP-native
ocpp.description: Built around OCPP workflows and charging infrastructure operations.

offline.title: Offline detection
offline.description: Quickly identify disconnected stations before your customers do.

fleet.title: Fleet overview
fleet.description: Get a single view of every station deployed in the field.

reliable.title: Reliable monitoring
reliable.description: Designed for installers who need trustworthy operational visibility.

featuresSection.title: Built for EV charging installers
featuresSection.subtitle: Focus on operating your infrastructure, not chasing charger status.

mvpFeatures.title: Included today
mvpFeatures.subtitle: Everything required to supervise a fleet of charging stations.

cta.title: Stop guessing.
cta.subtitle: Know the status of every charger in real time.

hero.title: A platform built for the whole EV installer workflow
hero.subtitle: Watchborne centralizes the supervision of your charging stations to save you time and bring reliability, from installation to maintenance.

intro.title: What is Watchborne?
intro.description: Watchborne is an OCPP monitoring platform built for EV charging station installers. It centralizes the status of every charger, across every site, in a single real-time dashboard — so you always know what's happening in the field, without driving out or waiting for a customer call.

workflow.title: Time saved at every step
workflow.subtitle: From commissioning to customer support, Watchborne supports the whole lifecycle of your charging stations.

installation.title: Commissioning
installation.description: Instantly confirm a newly installed charger is communicating correctly, without waiting for customer feedback.

monitoring.title: Daily supervision
monitoring.description: Keep a real-time eye on the connection and charging status of your whole fleet, across sites, from a single screen.

maintenance.title: Maintenance & intervention
maintenance.description: Catch disconnections and anomalies before your customers do, and prioritize field interventions accordingly.

reporting.title: Customer reporting
reporting.description: Give your customers reliable visibility into their charger availability, without manual reporting.

constructionNotice.title: A product under construction, an ambitious roadmap
constructionNotice.description: Watchborne is under active development. The capabilities below are part of an ambitious roadmap, built together with EV installers to address their real needs in the field.

items.alerting: Automatic alerts on faults or disconnections

page.title: Configuration
page.subtitle: Set up how your charge points connect and discover upcoming features.

connection.title: Connect a charge point to Watchborne
connection.description: For a charge point to report its status in Watchborne, it needs to connect to our OCPP server. Enter the address below in the charge point's OCPP settings, then suffix it with the charge point's unique identifier.

steps.openSettings: Open the charge point's OCPP settings (sometimes called the "Central System URL"), usually found in its admin interface.
steps.enterAddress: Enter the OCPP server address above.
steps.appendId: Suffix the address with the charge point's unique identifier, for example: {example}
steps.restart: Save and restart the charge point: it will appear in Watchborne as soon as it first connects.

association.title: Associate a charge point with a site
association.description: Association happens directly from the charge point's form: open "Charge Points", then create or edit a charge point and select its site in the "Site" field. A charge point can only be attached to one site at a time.

comingSoon.title: More sections coming soon
comingSoon.description: New configuration topics will be added here as Watchborne evolves.
